top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Box rates soar $1,000 in one week on peak rush
top_signals.summary:
Rate hikes and surcharges pushed up benchmark ocean container rates by $1,000 in the latest week, with more to come.

The post Box rates soar $1,000 in one week on peak rush appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Border Patrol arrests 36 truck drivers in immigration operation
top_signals.summary:
U.S. Border Patrol arrested 36 truck drivers during a five-day enforcement operation in Arizona, highlighting growing federal scrutiny of commercial drivers' immigration and licensing status.

The post Border Patrol arrests 36 truck drivers in immigration operation appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Microsoft unveils new AI models to lessen reliance on OpenAI and lower costs for developers
top_signals.summary: At its Build developer conference, Microsoft is announcing series of generative AI models to try and crack a market controlled by OpenAI, Anthropic and Google.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CISA flags two-year-old Oracle flaw as actively exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: CISA has ordered government agencies to secure their systems against a high-severity Oracle WebLogic Server vulnerability that was patched two years ago and is now actively exploited in attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: NSA selects new leads for key cybersecurity posts
top_signals.summary: David Imbordino, an NSA senior executive who most recently led its cybersecurity directorate in an acting capacity, has been named as its new chief. Bruce Jones, a career NSA technical and operational leader, as the new head of its Cybersecurity Collaboration Center.
